hero.title: AI Agents That Think Ahead.
hero.subtitle: We build intelligent AI agents that automate your business, engage your customers, and scale your operations. Next-generation intelligence, delivered.

features.title: Why Brainigen?
features.subtitle: We combine cutting-edge AI with deep business understanding to deliver agents that actually work.
features.custom_agents_desc: Purpose-built agents trained on your data, fine-tuned for your workflows, and designed to handle complex conversations with human-like understanding.
features.automation_desc: Eliminate repetitive tasks and streamline operations with intelligent workflows that learn and adapt to your business processes over time.
features.integration_desc: Deploy agents across your existing stack — CRM, helpdesk, messaging platforms, and custom applications — with zero downtime.

services.title: What We Build
services.subtitle: End-to-end AI solutions tailored to your business needs.
services.agent_dev_desc: Custom conversational AI agents that understand context, remember interactions, and deliver personalized experiences at scale.
services.automation_desc: Streamline operations with intelligent workflows that reduce manual effort by up to 80% while improving accuracy.
services.integration_desc: Embed AI capabilities into your existing systems with our robust APIs and pre-built connectors for popular platforms.
services.consulting_desc: AI roadmap and implementation guidance from experts who've deployed solutions for enterprises across industries.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: From idea to deployment in weeks, not months.
how_it_works.step1_desc: We learn about your business, challenges, and goals.
how_it_works.step2_desc: We architect the perfect AI solution for your needs.
how_it_works.step3_desc: We develop, train, and rigorously test your agents.
how_it_works.step4_desc: We launch, monitor, and continuously optimize.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, scale as you grow. No hidden fees.
pricing.free_desc: Perfect for testing and small projects.
pricing.enterprise_link: Contact us for custom enterprise solutions.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by teams who are building the future.
testimonials.t1_quote: Brainigen transformed our customer support. Response times dropped by 70% and satisfaction scores have never been higher.
testimonials.t2_quote: The AI agents they built for us handle thousands of conversations daily with remarkable accuracy. Best investment we've made.
testimonials.t3_quote: What impressed us most was the seamless integration. Brainigen's team had our agents running within our existing systems in just two weeks.

cta_section.title: Ready to Build Your AI Future?
cta_section.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute discovery call. No commitments, no pressure — just a conversation about what's possible.

footer.tagline: Building the next generation of intelligent agents that transform how businesses operate and scale.
footer.newsletter_desc: Get the latest on AI agents and product updates.

errors.title: Something went wrong
